entries.source: She decided to move to Belgium.
We cut trees with an axe.
What sort of house do you have?
I'll stay here a whole month.
We'll buy some paraffin for them.
I don't want to go to school!
The train arrived at the station on time.
I don't want to go to school.
Currently Burj Khalifa is the tallest skyscraper in the world.
entries.expected: Burj Khalifa ndicho chivakwa chihombe pasirose.
entries.raw_predicted: Parizvino Burj Khalifa ndiyo skyscraper yakarebesa pasi rose.
